summary: Built 5-slot ecosystem aggregator infrastructure (4 NEW namespaces + Node-20 stdlib poller + cron */15 CI + dashboard section + sync mirror URLs). 2 external blockers surfaced honestly: KF-01 (4/5 target repos inaccessible from current fine-grained PAT) and KF-02 (PAT lacks actions:secrets:write). Pattern scales to N repos the moment access is granted; no skill change needed.

key_findings_for_NTS_decision.summary: Fine-grained PAT can only see Uniton_Shared. The other 4 target repos return 404. Need NTS to (a) expand PAT, (b) correct repo names, or (c) confirm repos not yet created.
PAT lacks actions:secrets:write. Mitigated via workflow's GITHUB_TOKEN fallback — functionally equivalent for current scope.
key_findings_for_NTS_decision.remediation_effort_NTS: 5 min PAT scope edit, OR accept fallback

ac_status_summary: 11 PASS + 2 BLOCKED-by-PAT-scope (KF-01, KF-02) + 5 PENDING-mechanical (Phase J/K/L). Both BLOCKED items are external constraints with honest disclosure + workflow-fallback mitigation.
boundary_check_summary: 11/12 PASS — only repo-secret-via-gh-secret-set blocked (KF-02); workflow fallback covers it.
next_recommended_for_CLA: Author short NTS-facing memo: 'PAT scope decision for ecosystem aggregator' (KF-01 + KF-02 + 3 options). Once NTS picks, the existing poller produces real data on next cycle. ALTERNATIVE: continue skill-execution model momentum with LANE01-SKILL-AIER-CANON-GUARD-EXECUTABLE-V1.
